attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	stgex.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
	usr.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
	app.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	terr.BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD,
	stgex.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	stgex.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	stgex.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	CASE	 
		WHEN	 stgex.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
	 
		WHEN	  stgex.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
	END	  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	stgex.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	 'I'            ACTION_CODE,
	 'I'  AS  DML_TYPE
FROM	 
	(
	SELECT
		st.ROLE_NAME,
		st.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		st.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
		st.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,
		st.STATUS,
		st.LVL_NUMBER,
		st.TOOL_ID,
		st.ERP_SEGMENT1,
		st.IAM_USER_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SCM_HIER st  WHERE st.LVL_NUMBER>0
		) stgex
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  ctrl
	ON	 (stgex.TOOL_ID=ctrl.TOOL_ID 
	AND	 ctrl.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT	 coalesce(SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD 
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV
WHERE	 END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01' 
GROUP	 BY 1
UNION	
SELECT	 coalesce(SALES_COVERAGE_CODE, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD  
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV
WHERE	 END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01' 
GROUP	 BY 1
) terr  
	ON	 stgex.ERP_SEGMENT1 = terr.BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE rol
	ON	 stgex.ROLE_NAME=rol.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER usr
	ON	 usr.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = stgex.IAM_USER_ID 
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION app
	ON	 stgex.TOOL_ID= app.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT

SELECT st.IAM_USER_ID, 
ST.ROLE_ID, 
ST.ROLE_NAME, 
ST.TOOL_ID, 
ST.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE, 
ST.LVL_NUMBER, 
ST.ERP_SEGMENT1, 
ST.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, 
ST.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG, 
ST.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG, 
ST.RESTRICTION_FLAG, 
ST.PROXY_FLAG, 
ST.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID, 
ST.GRANTOR_CEC_ID, 
ST.GRANTOR_CCO_ID, 
ST.STATUS, 
ST.TR_FLAG, 
ST.LAST_ACTION, 
ST.CREATED_BY, 
ST.CREATE_DATE, 
ST.UPDATED_BY, 
ST.UPDATE_DATE, 
ST.ACTION_CODE, 
ST.BATCH_ID, 
ST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SCM_HIER st

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  ctrl
	ON	 (st.TOOL_ID=ctrl.TOOL_ID 
	AND	 ctrl.STATUS ='A')

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE rol
	ON	 st.ROLE_NAME=rol.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER usr
	ON	 usr.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = st.IAM_USER_ID 
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION app
	ON	 st.TOOL_ID= app.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
WHERE ctrl.TOOL_ID IS NULL 
OR rol.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NULL
OR usr.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT IS NULL
OR app.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IS NULL
OR  st.ERP_SEGMENT1 NOT IN (
SELECT	 coalesce(SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD 
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV
WHERE	 END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01' 
GROUP	 BY 1
UNION	
SELECT	 coalesce(SALES_COVERAGE_CODE, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD  
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV
WHERE	 END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01' 
GROUP	 BY 1
)

SELECT 
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
IAM_USER_KEY,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
terr.BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD,
ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
'1' as IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE,
'Y'  AS ALL_NODES_ALLOWED_FLG
from (
SELECT
	stgex.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
	usr.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
	app.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	stgex.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	stgex.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	stgex.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	CASE	 
		WHEN	 stgex.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
	 
		WHEN	  stgex.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
	END	  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	stgex.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	 'I'            ACTION_CODE,
	 'I'  AS  DML_TYPE
FROM	 
	(
	SELECT
		st.ROLE_NAME,
		st.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		st.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
		st.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,
		st.STATUS,
		st.LVL_NUMBER,
		st.TOOL_ID,
		st.ERP_SEGMENT1,
		st.IAM_USER_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SCM_HIER st 
	WHERE LVL_NUMBER = 0
		) stgex
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  ctrl
	ON	 (stgex.TOOL_ID=ctrl.TOOL_ID 
	AND	 ctrl.STATUS ='A')
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE rol
	ON	 stgex.ROLE_NAME=rol.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER usr
	ON	 usr.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = stgex.IAM_USER_ID 
	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION app
	ON	 stgex.TOOL_ID= app.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT

) A	

FULL JOIN 
(
SELECT	 COALESCE(SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD  
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV
WHERE	 END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01' 
GROUP	 BY 1
) terr  
	ON	 1=1 WHERE IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL
AND (BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_USER_KEY, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD)
	NOT IN (SELECT BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_USER_KEY, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, BK_SALES_COVERAGE_CD FROM $$WORKDB.W_IAM_SCMS_HIER_LINK)
